intro.line1: I’m a creative technologist working across audio-reactive visuals, interactive installation, and real-time systems, based in Naarm / Melbourne.
about.p1: Nicholas Marriott is a creative technologist based in Naarm / Melbourne, b. 1999 in Aotearoa New Zealand. He works in real-time systems as a visual designer, performer, and exhibiting artist, across of variety of mediums.
about.p2: His visuals have featured on major stages and screens, including The xx's 2026 festival tour and a Grammy winning music video for Nine Inch Nails, alongside commercial work for Nike and live performances at festivals including Pitch Music & Arts. His installation work extends these systems into physical space, most recently a large scale reactive light environment for Chadstone. His practice has been profiled in It's Nice That and Rolling Stone.
now.statement: Seeking experimentation and collaborative artistic exploration through the use of real-time technology. Please don't hesitate to reach out if this is relevant to you!
